name: Apple Custard Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 cup packed light brown sugar, divided
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 450°F. Line an ungreased 9-inch pie pan with pastry dough. Mix 2 tablespoons of the flour and 1/4 cup of the sugar, blending well and sprinkle evenly over the bottom of the pie shell. Arrange the apple halves, cored-side up in a pie shell. In a medium bowl, combine the egg and milk. Pour over the apples. In a separate bowl, blend the remaining 2 tablespoons of flour with the remaining 3/4 cup sugar, cinnamon, and nutmeg. Sprinkle over the apple halves. Bake at 450°F for 10 minutes, then reduce heat to 325°F and bake for 30 minutes more or until custard is firm and a knife inserted into it comes out clean.
